def solve(nums)
  sorted_abs = nums.sort_by { |x| x.abs }
  n = nums.length
  total = 0
  (0...n-1).each do |i|
    target = 2 * sorted_abs[i]
    left = 0
    right = sorted_abs.length
    while left < right
      mid = (left + right) / 2
      if sorted_abs[mid] > target
        right = mid
      else
        left = mid + 1
      end
    end
    upper = left
    total += upper - (i + 1)
  end
  total
end
